user.title: Connect to Quilt
user.description: Enter the email address associated with your Quilt account. A one-time passcode will be sent to that address.

otp.title: Enter passcode
otp.description: Enter the one-time passcode sent to {email}.

home.title: Select home
home.description: Your account has {count} homes. Select the one you want to integrate.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Quilt
reauth_confirm.description: Your Quilt session for {email} has expired. Click submit to receive a new passcode.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Quilt cloud. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid passcode. Please check the code and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Quilt home is already configured.
